## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request is focused on one change or one related set of changes.
- [ ] I removed secrets, tokens, private paths, and sensitive logs.
- [ ] I considered impacts on ticket workflow statuses, artifacts, prompts, parsers, and UI details.
